creator: sab@vegamuse.org
text:
> >Synopsis:       Update port: wmmon
      
      Thanks.  I saw your patches and it seems good for many FreeBSD
      versions!
      
      BTW, in your PR, you change MAINTAINER line of this port.  Does
      current maintainer (Kris Kennaway) know this?
      
I notified Kris via e-mail, but haven't heard anything back.  I did the
original patches (minus one that Kris did for the Makefiles to work in the
ports collection) to make it work on 2.2.x and 3.0.

--
Stephen Kiernan      | FreeBSD ports-related e-mail: sk-ports@vegamuse.org
kiernasj@connix.com  |
sab@vegamuse.org     |            FreeBSD -- Get it, use it!
